visual_description: The scene is set in a dimly lit, cluttered room with greenish walls and a large metal cabinet. A man in a patterned shirt is seen from behind, moving towards a dark door on the left side of the frame. He reaches for the door handle and begins to open it, revealing a red diamond-shaped decoration with a Chinese character on it.
audio_description: The audio features a rhythmic, percussive beat, possibly from a drum, creating a tense and suspenseful atmosphere.
